name: WEB-Interia
postAttachCommand: bash -lc 'cd /workspaces/WEB-Interia && pgrep -f "python3 -m http.server 8000 --bind 0.0.0.0" >/dev/null || (nohup python3 -m http.server 8000 --bind 0.0.0.0 >/tmp/web-interia.log 2>&1 & echo $! >/tmp/web-interia.pid); pgrep -f "python3 -m http.server 8001 --bind 0.0.0.0" >/dev/null || (nohup python3 -m http.server 8001 --bind 0.0.0.0 >/tmp/web-interia-preview.log 2>&1 & echo $! >/tmp/web-interia-preview.pid); if command -v gh >/dev/null && [ -n "${CODESPACE_NAME:-}" ] && { [ -n "${GITHUB_TOKEN:-}" ] || [ -n "${GH_TOKEN:-}" ]; }; then GH_TOKEN="${GH_TOKEN:-${GITHUB_TOKEN:-}}" gh codespace ports visibility -c "$CODESPACE_NAME" 8000:public >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; GH_TOKEN="${GH_TOKEN:-${GITHUB_TOKEN:-}}" gh codespace ports visibility -c "$CODESPACE_NAME" 8001:public >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; GH_TOKEN="${GH_TOKEN:-${GITHUB_TOKEN:-}}" gh codespace ports visibility -c "$CODESPACE_NAME" 5432:public >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi'
